title: Replace Studiora logo with uploaded custom image

requirements.text: Save the uploaded image (open book with green sprout and blue/purple circular background) as the Studiora logo asset at `frontend/public/assets/generated/studiora-logo.png` and use it as the logo displayed in the app header (Layout.tsx) and on the login/landing page (LoginPage.tsx), replacing any previously generated or SVG-based logo.

quotes: Use this image as studiora logo.

acceptanceCriteria: The uploaded image is saved as `frontend/public/assets/generated/studiora-logo.png`.
The sticky header in Layout.tsx renders the image as the Studiora logo (replacing any prior logo element).
The login/landing page (LoginPage.tsx) renders the same image as the app logo.
The logo image has appropriate alt text ('Studiora logo') and a sensible display size (e.g., h-8 or h-10 in the header, larger on the login page).
No broken image references or leftover old logo elements remain.

constraints: Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/ that are listed as immutable.
nonGoals: Changing the app color theme or any other branding elements beyond the logo.
